meaning: The technique of giving human characteristics, emotions, and behaviors to animals or non-human objects.
definition: The technique of giving human characteristics, emotions, and behaviors to animals or non-human objects.
example: In the cartoon, the talking dog displaying human emotions is an example of anthropomorphism.
exampleHindi: कार्टून में, मानवीय भावनाओं को प्रदर्शित करने वाला बात करने वाला कुत्ता मानवरूपता का एक उदाहरण है।

meaning: A novel that focuses on the psychological and moral growth of a protagonist from youth to adulthood.
definition: A novel that focuses on the psychological and moral growth of a protagonist from youth to adulthood.
example: Great Expectations by Charles Dickens is a classic Bildungsroman tracking the life of a boy named Pip.
exampleHindi: चार्ल्स डिकेंस की ग्रेट एक्सपेक्टेशंस एक क्लासिक बिल्डुंग्स्रोमन है जो पिप नाम के एक लड़के के जीवन पर नज़र रखती है।

meaning: The transformation or inner journey of a character over the course of a story.
definition: The transformation or inner journey of a character over the course of a story.
example: The selfish protagonist has a wonderful character arc, learning to care for others by the end of the book.
exampleHindi: स्वार्थी नायक के पास एक अद्भुत चरित्र है, जो पुस्तक के अंत तक दूसरों की देखभाल करना सीख जाता है।

meaning: A phrase, idea, or plot element that has been overused so much that it has lost its original meaning or impact.
definition: A phrase, idea, or plot element that has been overused so much that it has lost its original meaning or impact.
example: Starting a story with 'It was a dark and stormy night' is a major cliché in creative writing.
exampleHindi: 'यह एक अंधेरी और तूफानी रात थी' के साथ कहानी शुरू करना रचनात्मक लेखन में एक प्रमुख घिसी-पिटी बात है।

meaning: An ending to an episode, chapter, or book that leaves the audience in suspense and eager to know what happens next.
definition: An ending to an episode, chapter, or book that leaves the audience in suspense and eager to know what happens next.
example: The chapter ended on a cliffhanger, with the main character trapped in a burning building.
exampleHindi: अध्याय एक चट्टान पर समाप्त हुआ, जिसमें मुख्य पात्र एक जलती हुई इमारत में फंस गया था।

meaning: An artificial or improbable plot device used to suddenly solve a seemingly hopeless problem in a story.
definition: An artificial or improbable plot device used to suddenly solve a seemingly hopeless problem in a story.
example: The army arriving out of nowhere to save the hero was a disappointing deus ex machina.
exampleHindi: नायक को बचाने के लिए कहीं से भी आ रही सेना निराशाजनक थी।

meaning: Written or spoken conversation between two or more characters in a story, book, or play.
definition: A conversation between two or more characters in a book, play, or film
example: The dialogue in the script was natural and sounded like real people talking.
exampleHindi: स्क्रिप्ट में संवाद स्वाभाविक था और ऐसा लग रहा था जैसे वास्तविक लोग बात कर रहे हों।

meaning: The process of correcting, improving, and organizing a piece of writing to prepare it for publication.
definition: The process of correcting, improving, and organizing a piece of writing to prepare it for publication.
example: Good editing can turn a messy first draft into a polished, readable book.
exampleHindi: अच्छा संपादन एक अव्यवस्थित पहले ड्राफ्ट को एक बेहतर, पठनीय पुस्तक में बदल सकता है।

meaning: The introduction of background information about characters, settings, or events at the beginning of a story.
definition: The introduction of background information about characters, settings, or events at the beginning of a story.
example: The first chapter is mostly exposition, explaining how the family ended up living in the old lighthouse.
exampleHindi: पहला अध्याय अधिकतर प्रदर्शनी है, जिसमें बताया गया है कि परिवार पुराने प्रकाशस्तंभ में कैसे रहने लगा।

meaning: The very first sentence or opening passage of a story designed to grab the reader's attention immediately.
definition: The beginning of a video designed to grab the viewer's attention instantly.
example: The novel's opening hook was so exciting that I couldn't put the book down.
exampleHindi: उपन्यास की शुरूआत इतनी रोमांचक थी कि मैं किताब नीचे नहीं रख सका।

meaning: A long speech delivered by a single character in a play, movie, or book, addressed to other characters or the audience.
definition: A long speech delivered by a single character in a play, movie, or book, addressed to other characters or the audience.
example: The actor performed a dramatic monologue expressing his character's grief.
exampleHindi: अभिनेता ने अपने चरित्र के दुःख को व्यक्त करते हुए एक नाटकीय एकालाप प्रस्तुत किया।

meaning: The underlying reason behind a character's actions, goals, and behaviors in a story.
example: To make your characters believable, you must give them a clear motivation, like love or revenge.
exampleHindi: अपने पात्रों को विश्वसनीय बनाने के लिए, आपको उन्हें प्यार या बदले जैसी स्पष्ट प्रेरणा देनी होगी।

meaning: The chronological path of a story, moving from the setup, through the conflict and climax, to the final resolution.
definition: The chronological path of a story, moving from the setup, through the conflict and climax, to the final resolution.
example: A satisfying narrative arc gives a story structure and keeps the reader engaged.
exampleHindi: एक संतोषजनक कथात्मक आर्क कहानी को संरचना प्रदान करता है और पाठक को बांधे रखता है।

meaning: The speed or rate at which a story's events unfold and the narrative moves forward.
definition: The speed or rate at which a story's events unfold and the narrative moves forward.
example: The novel starts slowly to build the characters, but the pacing increases during the action scenes.
exampleHindi: उपन्यास में पात्रों का निर्माण धीरे-धीरे शुरू होता है, लेकिन एक्शन दृश्यों के दौरान गति बढ़ जाती है।

meaning: An inconsistency or logical gap in the storyline of a book, movie, or play.
definition: An inconsistency or logical gap in the storyline of a book, movie, or play.
example: The movie had a huge plot hole where a character suddenly appears in a city without explanation.
exampleHindi: फिल्म में एक बड़ा कथानक था जहां एक पात्र बिना किसी स्पष्टीकरण के अचानक एक शहर में प्रकट होता है।

meaning: An unexpected development or surprise change in the direction of a story's plot.
definition: An unexpected development or surprise change in the direction of a story's plot.
example: The movie had a massive plot twist at the end that nobody saw coming.
exampleHindi: फिल्म के कथानक में अंत में एक बड़ा मोड़ था जिसे किसी ने भी नहीं देखा।

meaning: A literary device where good characters are rewarded and bad characters are punished in an appropriate, often ironic way.
definition: A literary device where good characters are rewarded and bad characters are punished in an appropriate, often ironic way.
example: It was a moment of poetic justice when the corrupt businessman lost all his money in the scam.
exampleHindi: यह काव्यात्मक न्याय का क्षण था जब भ्रष्ट व्यवसायी ने घोटाले में अपना सारा पैसा खो दिया।

meaning: The perspective from which a story is told (such as first-person 'I' or third-person 'he/she').
definition: The perspective from which a story is told (such as first-person 'I' or third-person 'he/she').
example: Writing the novel from the point of view of the villain gave the story an interesting perspective.
exampleHindi: खलनायक के दृष्टिकोण से उपन्यास लिखने से कहानी को एक दिलचस्प परिप्रेक्ष्य मिला।

meaning: The final step of reading a text to find and correct minor spelling, grammar, and punctuation mistakes.
definition: The final step of reading a text to find and correct minor spelling, grammar, and punctuation mistakes.
example: Before submitting your essay, spend ten minutes proofreading it to catch any typos.
exampleHindi: अपना निबंध सबमिट करने से पहले, किसी भी प्रकार की त्रुटि को पकड़ने के लिए उसे प्रूफ़रीड करने में दस मिनट का समय व्यतीत करें।

meaning: A misleading clue or false lead designed to distract the reader from the actual truth or mystery.
definition: Introducing an irrelevant topic to divert attention from the original issue.
example: The suspicious butler was a red herring to keep the audience from guessing the real murderer.
exampleHindi: दर्शकों को असली हत्यारे का अनुमान लगाने से रोकने के लिए संदिग्ध बटलर एक चालाक व्यक्ति था।

meaning: A writing rule where actions, feelings, and details are shown rather than explained directly to the reader.
definition: A writing rule where actions, feelings, and details are shown rather than explained directly to the reader.
example: Instead of writing 'He was angry', use show, don't tell by writing 'He slammed the door and clenched his fists'.
exampleHindi: 'वह गुस्से में था' लिखने के बजाय शो का प्रयोग करें, 'उसने दरवाजा पटक दिया और अपनी मुट्ठियां भींच लीं' लिखकर न बताएं।

meaning: A writing style that mimics the continuous, unedited flow of thoughts, feelings, and memories in a character's mind.
definition: A writing style that mimics the continuous, unedited flow of thoughts, feelings, and memories in a character's mind.
example: The novel uses stream of consciousness, so the text reads like a chaotic sequence of thoughts.
exampleHindi: उपन्यास चेतना की धारा का उपयोग करता है, इसलिए पाठ विचारों के एक अराजक अनुक्रम की तरह लगता है।

meaning: A secondary plot or minor story that runs alongside the main plot in a novel, play, or movie.
definition: A secondary plot or minor story that runs alongside the main plot in a novel, play, or movie.
example: The movie's main plot is a space battle, but there is a romantic subplot between the two pilots.
exampleHindi: फिल्म का मुख्य कथानक एक अंतरिक्ष युद्ध है, लेकिन दो पायलटों के बीच एक रोमांटिक सबप्लॉट भी है।

meaning: The feeling of excited or anxious uncertainty about what may happen next in a story.
definition: A state of mental uncertainty or excitement in awaiting an outcome
example: The slow creak of the door opened, keeping the audience in suspense.
exampleHindi: दरवाज़ा धीमी आवाज़ में खुला, जिससे दर्शक असमंजस में पड़ गए।

meaning: The writer's attitude toward the subject matter or audience, expressed through word choice and style.
definition: The attitude of a writer toward a subject or an audience, conveyed through word choice.
example: The tone of the article was serious and urgent, warning readers about environmental dangers.
exampleHindi: लेख का लहजा गंभीर और जरूरी था, जो पाठकों को पर्यावरणीय खतरों के बारे में आगाह करता था।

meaning: A common theme, device, or cliché that appears frequently in a particular genre of literature or film.
definition: A common theme, device, or cliché that appears frequently in a particular genre of literature or film.
example: The mentor who dies early in the story is a classic fantasy trope.
exampleHindi: जो गुरु कहानी की शुरुआत में ही मर जाता है, वह एक क्लासिक फंतासी कहानी है।

meaning: The unique style, tone, and personality of a writer or character that makes their writing distinctive.
definition: The unique style, tone, and personality of a writer or character that makes their writing distinctive.
example: The author writes with a humorous and engaging voice that makes her books easy to read.
exampleHindi: लेखिका हास्यप्रद और आकर्षक आवाज के साथ लिखती हैं जिससे उनकी किताबें पढ़ना आसान हो जाता है।

meaning: The process of creating a detailed, imaginary world with its own history, geography, and rules, typical of fantasy and sci-fi.
definition: The process of creating a detailed, imaginary world with its own history, geography, and rules, typical of fantasy and sci-fi.
example: J.R.R. Tolkien is legendary for his incredible world-building in creating Middle-earth.
exampleHindi: जे.आर.आर. टॉल्किन मध्य-पृथ्वी के निर्माण में अपने अविश्वसनीय विश्व-निर्माण के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं।
